title: sanjaysgk/ipg pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the samplesheet provided via params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

strandedness.errorMessage: strandedness must be one of: forward, reverse, unstranded, auto

rep.errorMessage: rep must be a positive integer replicate number (e.g. 1, 2, 3); reps sharing a sample are merged and numbered rg<rep>

condition.errorMessage: condition must be a single token without spaces (e.g. IFN_pos); all reps of one sample must share the same condition
